title: JAPANESE Proficiency - IT System Development Project Manager & Delivery Lead
description:
1. Job Description

- Play as Project Manager (Project Management Office) or Delivery Lead on banking system development or implementation projects.

- Manage the progress and milestone. Promote and control the issue & ToDo. Organize the progress report and report to client’s management. Also, manage the cost and human resource.

- Communicate closely with clients, business & IT related members. Organize teams and lead until the project ends.

- Manage client’s expectations to maintain the company’s impressions at a positive level.

2. Requirements

- Bachelor's Degree in Computer Sciences, Computer Engineer or Information Technology or related.

- IT Project Management Knowledge and Experiences

Must understand the overall software development life cycle.

3 or more years of experience of IT related project management or Delivery Lead. (Direct and manage project development from beginning to end)

Project Management Delivery tasks such as approach and plan definition, status tracking, issue and risk identification and resolution, resource planning, and governance execution

Will be able to understand and follow the process of the banking system development or implementation project.

- Japanese & English Language Skills

Must read, write and speak Japanese at a high level (native / JLPT N1 or higher) to engage with our Japanese-speaking clients and stakeholders.

Must speak English at a high level (business English) to communicate with team members from diverse cultural backgrounds.

- Banking Operation or Systems Knowledge and Experiences (as possible)

Will be able to understand the banking system structure, and high-level banking business.

- Others

Cheerful, good communication skill, able to work with team cohesively with high spirit

Highly self-motivated, enthusiastic and able to work effectively with teams that have diverse IT aptitudes and cultural backgrounds.

Attention to detail and highly organized, process-focused attitude.

Good conceptualization and analytical skills, enabling. Comprehension and development of solutions for complex business issues.

Ability to manage short, medium, and long-term planning horizons concurrently.

postedCompany.description: ISI-Dentsu South East Asia, a wholly foreign owned company of Information Services International-Dentsu, Ltd (ISID) of Japan, is a business technology company that provide core services in the areas of Cloud Computing Services, Innovation and Creative Ideas Enablement & Promotion, Business Performance Analysis & Intelligence, Social Media & Customer Relationship Management, Contact Centre Solutions, Reputation Management, Adaptive Web Services, as well as the capability of System Integration and Development for organizations of all sizes and industries.
postedCompany.name: DENTSU SOKEN SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
